output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?movieLabel WHERE {
  ?movie rdfs:label ?movieLabel ; wdt:P577 ?releaseDate ; wdt:P31 wd:Q11424 .
  FILTER(LCASE(STR(?movieLabel)) = "jason bourne")
  FILTER(LANGMATCHES(LANG(?movieLabel) , "en"))
}
output.result:
Got 3 rows and 1 column:
| movieLabel             |
| ---------------------- |
| Jason Bourne (lang:en) |
| Jason Bourne (lang:en) |
| Jason Bourne (lang:en) |
